title: Elektrik ve Elektronik Mühendisliği (İngilizce) Bölümü - Bölüm Başkanı Mesajı
content:
Sevgili Öğrenciler,

Saygılarımla,

Dear Students,

Welcome to the Department of Electrical-Electronics Engineering (100% English) at Istanbul Esenyurt University.

Electrical-Electronics Engineering is one of the most dynamic and strategic fields of engineering in our era. This discipline, which requires in-depth knowledge and competence in various areas—from energy systems to artificial intelligence, communication technologies to embedded systems—guides technological advancements.

Our department aims to equip students not only for national but also for international competitiveness through a 100% English curriculum. In addition to fundamental engineering courses, our program includes contemporary subjects such as power electronics, communication, control systems, microcontroller-based applications, and artificial intelligence, all supported by laboratory practices and project-based learning.

Our academic staff comprises 7 faculty members, 1 lecturer, and 1 research assistant, totaling 9 academic personnel. As of 2024, our undergraduate quota is set at 20 students, resulting in a student-to-faculty ratio of 2:1. This rare privilege among universities offers our students personalized academic support, effective mentorship, and strong communication opportunities.

Through university-industry collaborations and R&D-focused project opportunities, our students gain practical experience during their undergraduate studies. Upon graduation, they embark on their careers not only as engineers but also as innovative, solution-oriented individuals with a global perspective.

Situated within the dynamic and multicultural fabric of Istanbul, our university embraces an educational philosophy that values cultural and social development alongside academic success.

I invite you to be part of this developmental journey and to build the future together.

Respectfully,

Head of Department

Electrical-Electronics Engineering

Istanbul Esenyurt University
